title: attendance — published macros
description: No dedicated request-level macros — attendance context is composite (session + athlete + enrollment + pass) + resolved via route bindings.

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::attendanceFingerprint
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the shared column family for check-in fraud-correlation columns: `device_fingerprint_hash` (varchar(64) nullable) + `ip_address` (inet nullable) + `gps_lat` (decimal(10,7) nullable) + `gps_lng` (decimal(10,7) nullable). Used by AttendanceRecord + reserved for future check-in-adjacent tables.
